name: gt15_composite_mutfirst
drl:
rule "R0"
no-loop
salience 5
when
    $p : P($x : f0)
    LK2(f1 == false)
then
    delete($p);
end
rule "R1"
no-loop
when
    not LK2(f1 != true)
    $p : P($x : f0, f1 == 0)
then
    $p.setF1(1);
    update($p);
    insertLogical(new LK2($x, false));
end
rule "R2"
when
    $p : P($x : f0)
then
end
